# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please provide a clear and concise description of your changes.

## Related Issue
<!-- If this PR addresses an existing issue, please link it here -->
Closes #IssueNumber

## Type of Change
<!-- Please delete options that are not applicable -->
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Configuration change
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Other: Please describe

## Checklist
<!-- Please double check everything before marking as complete -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] Any new and altered files were tested
- [ ] Linting passes in my repository
- [ ] Tests pass

### Functionality
- [ ] The implementation solves the original issue
- [ ] All edge cases have been considered
- [ ] The solution is backwards compatible
- [ ] The solution works with all supported browsers/environments
- [ ] The implementation is secure
- [ ] The implementation respects user privacy
- [ ] The implementation is accessible

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have updated API documentation if applicable
- [ ] I have updated any relevant guides
- [ ] I have added inline comments to complex logic

## Additional Information
<!-- Add any other context about the pull request here -->
